headlines.description: Bayer Leverkusen's 35-game unbeaten Bundesliga run ended on Saturday when visiting RB Leipzig came from two goals down to snatch a 3-2 win helped by a Loïs Openda double.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen's unbeaten run ends after 35 games

video.headline: Leverkusen's 35-game unbeaten Bundesliga run ended by RB Leipzig
